recalls.Description: Pearhead is recalling its Learning Sets, model number 87150, which are marketed as developmental toys for infants aged 0-6 months. These sets include eight pieces such as a cow stroller toy, crinkle sheep toy, a black and white tummy time book with flashcards, a plush activity cube, and a wooden egg shaker rattle. The model number can be found on the side of the packaging beneath the barcode.
recalls.Title: Pearhead Recalls Infant Learning Toy Sets for Choking Hazard and Federal Regulation Violation
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Pearhead at 888-308-4928 from 9:30 a.m. to 6 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, or email service@pearhead.com. Additional details are available at https://www.pearhead.com/pages/product-recall or by visiting www.pearhead.com and selecting 'Recall' at the bottom of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled Pearhead Learning Set Model Number

Retailers.Name: Kohls stores nationwide and online at Kohls.com, Oyaco.com, Faire.com, Pearhead.com and Amazon.com from August 2024 through October 2024 for about $30.

Hazards.Name: Choking hazard due to wooden egg-shaped rattle

Remedies.Name: Stop using the egg shaker and contact Pearhead for a free replacement and refund.

seo.metaDescription: Pearhead recalls Learning Toy Sets due to choking hazards. Contact them for a replacement and refund.
seo.ogTitle: Pearhead Recalls Infant Learning Toy Sets for Choking Hazard and Federal Regulation Violation
seo.ogDescription: Pearhead recalls Learning Toy Sets due to choking hazards. Contact them for a replacement and refund.
seo.twitterTitle: Pearhead Recalls Infant Learning Toy Sets for Choking Hazard and Federal Regulation Violation
seo.twitterDescription: Pearhead recalls Learning Toy Sets due to choking hazards. Contact them for a replacement and refund.

recalls.Description: The recall pertains to the Manhattan Toy Brilliant Bee Rattle, which features a plastic light-up bee on a wooden rod with a wooden base. This toy includes three plastic rings on the rod and a baby-safe mirror at the base's bottom. It is powered by non-removable batteries, and the model number '166700 CQ' is located on the base. The dimensions of the rattle are approximately seven inches in height and four inches in width.
recalls.Title: Sassy Baby Issues Recall for Manhattan Toy Brilliant Bee Rattles Due to Choking Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Manhattan Toy at 800-541-1345 from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT Monday through Thursday, and 8 a.m. to 12 p.m. CT on Friday. You can also email help@manhattantoy.com or visit www.manhattantoy.com/pages/recall-information for more details.

Images.Caption: Recalled Manhattan Toy Brilliant Bee Rattle

Retailers.Name: Independent specialty toy stores nationwide and online at www.manhattantoy.com from May 2024 through June 2024 for about $16.

Importers.Name: Sassy Baby Inc., of Gonzales, Louisiana

Hazards.Name: Choking hazard due to potential detachment of the wooden base from the rod, releasing plastic rings.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should stop using the recalled rattles immediately, keep them away from children, and return the product to the retailer for a full refund. Alternatively, reach out to Manhattan Toy for return instructions; proof of purchase is not necessary for a refund.

seo.metaDescription: Sassy Baby recalls Manhattan Toy Brilliant Bee Rattles due to choking hazards. Learn how to return for a full refund.
seo.ogTitle: Sassy Baby Issues Recall for Manhattan Toy Brilliant Bee Rattles Due to Choking Risk

seo.twitterDescription: Sassy Baby recalls Manhattan Toy Brilliant Bee Rattles due to choking hazards. Learn how to return for a full refund.

recalls.Description: Primark is recalling its baby rattles, specifically the 'Wooden Music Shaker' and 'DTR M&M Maracas', due to safety concerns. These rattles, available in yellow, red, light green, and light blue, feature popular characters like 'Minnie Mouse' on the red version and 'Mickey Mouse' on the yellow one. The product packaging displays the numbers 7495201 for the Wooden Music Shaker and 5311101 for the DTR M&M Maracas.
recalls.Title: Primark Recalls Baby Rattles Due to Choking and Ingestion Risks
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Primark U.S. at 617-946-3236 from 8 a.m. to 5 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. Additional details can be found online at https://www.primark.com/en-us/help/recall-wooden-shaker or visit www.primark.com and click on 'Recall' at the bottom of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled Primark "DTR M&M Maracas" baby rattles
Recalled Primark "Wooden Music Shaker" baby rattles

Injuries.Name: The firm has received five reports of the rattles breaking apart in the United Kingdom. No injuries have been reported.

Retailers.Name: Primark U.S. stores located in the northeast region, Florida, Maryland and Chicago from March 2021 through August 2023 for between $3.50 and $4.50.

Hazards.Name: Detachment of the bottom part posing choking and ingestion risks

Remedies.Name: Return the rattles for a full refund

seo.metaDescription: Primark recalls baby rattles due to choking hazards. Return for a full refund. Contact Primark for more details.
